features: REDUCES PUFFINESS FAST: Gently cools the under-eye area to help reduce puffiness caused by tiredness, allergies or lack of sleep. Perfect for early mornings, late nights or long days at work.
EASES HAYFEVER SYMPTOMS: Provides welcome relief from itchy, watery eyes caused by pollen. Ideal for use during hayfever season or after time spent outdoors in nature.

COOLING COMFORT: This cooling gel eye mask gives fast soothing relief when eyes feel hot, tired or irritated. Pop it in the fridge for 15 minutes, then use it after a long day, during hayfever season or after screen time.

SOOTHES TIRED EYES: Nuage cooling eye mask is made to soothe tired, irritated and inflamed eyes with a gentle cooling feel. It is ideal after work, study, travel or any moment when eyes need a calm and refreshing pause.
REUSABLE & EASY TO CLEAN: Simply wash and reuse, making it a cost-effective option for regular self-care. Ideal for eco-conscious users who want less waste and more comfort.
READY TO USE IN MINUTES: Just chill in the fridge and it’s ready to go. Great for a quick refresh before a night out, after workouts or when relaxing with a face mask.
description: Product Description Bring a little calm to tired eyes with the Nuage Cooling Gel Eye Mask, a simple and soothing essential for daily comfort. Designed to help reduce puffiness while delivering a refreshing cooling feel, this gel eye mask is ideal for moments when the eye area feels tired, irritated or inflamed. Whether it is a busy morning, a long day in front of screens, or one of those difficult hayfever afternoons, this Nuage cooling mask offers an easy way to give eyes a break. After just 15 minutes in the fridge, the mask is ready to use over closed eyes, bringing quick cooling comfort to the skin and surrounding eye area. It is especially useful during hayfever season, when pollen can leave eyes feeling sore, hot and uncomfortable. The soothing gel eye mask can also be used as part of a daily self-care routine, helping refresh and revive the face while giving a more awake and rested feel. For anyone looking for allergy relief, a cooling eye treatment or simply a gentle way to relax, this mask is a handy option to keep close by. The comfortable design makes it easy to use whenever needed, whether that is first thing in the morning, after work, after travel or before bed. It is suitable for daily use, which makes it a practical addition to any bathroom cabinet, bedside drawer or skincare shelf. Nuage has created a cooling gel eye mask that feels convenient, calming and easy to reach for, especially when puffiness, hayfever or inflamed eyes need soothing support. Simple to prepare and easy to enjoy, this Nuage cooling gel eye mask helps turn small moments into comforting ones. For tired eyes, puffy skin and those times when soothing allergy relief matters most, it is a refreshing everyday essential. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Manufacturer Contact Information Swirl Consumer Products Ltd, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. Swirl Consumer Products (Ireland) Limited, Block 3, Harcourt Centre, Harcourt Road, Dublin 2, D02 A339, Ireland.
